function.name: search_photos_v1
function.description: Search the user's photo and video library using structured filters. Return exactly one function call. Populate only filters that are explicitly requested or clearly implied. Prefer exact names from the provided entity lists for albums, people, location tags, and contacts. Use place_queries for city, region, country, or place names that are not saved user location tags. Use semantic_query only for visual content such as beach, dog, sunset, selfie, screenshot, concert, mountain, food, wedding, or receipt. Results are returned chronologically by the app. All time values are local time in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss format. end_local_exclusive is exclusive.

time_filter.description: Structured time constraint. Use kind=absolute_range for one resolved range. Use kind=multiple_ranges for several explicit resolved ranges. Use the calendar kinds for recurring or calendar-based constraints so the app can expand them deterministically.

ranges.description: Resolved local datetime ranges. Required for absolute_range and multiple_ranges. end_local_exclusive must be exclusive.

end_local_exclusive.description: Exclusive range end in local time.

year.description: Calendar year when needed by the selected kind.

month.description: Calendar month when needed by the selected kind.

day.description: Calendar day when needed by the selected kind.

ente_album_names.description: Exact Ente album names from the provided available_ente_album_names list.

device_album_names.description: Exact on-device album names from the provided available_device_album_names list.

filename_query.description: Filename or title text to match.

caption_query.description: Caption or description text to match.

camera_make_query.description: Camera make text, such as Apple, Canon, Sony, Nikon, or Google.

camera_model_query.description: Camera model text, such as iPhone 15 Pro, EOS R5, Pixel 8, or A7 IV.

contact_names.description: Exact contact names or emails from the provided contact lists. Use only when ownership_scope is shared_by_contacts.

person_names.description: Exact recognized person names from the provided available_person_names list.

location_tag_names.description: Exact saved user location tag names from the provided available_location_tag_names list.

place_queries.description: Free-text city, region, country, landmark, or place names for place database resolution. Use this for places that are not saved user location tags.

semantic_query.description: Visual or semantic query for CLIP/Magic search. Use this for what is visually present in the photo or video.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.
